no: UNSUPPORTED: Author (Glittergear) has hidden the GitHub repo and is not supporting this mod. A replacement mod, Blood and Faith, is in development for BG1 that will make Errant Justice narratively obsolete. The mod still works but has known unfixed issues.
sum: UNSUPPORTED: Author has hidden the GitHub repo and is not supporting this mod. A replacement mod, Blood and Faith, is in development for BG1. The mod still works but has known unfixed issues.
